commands.repair_reason: There is one narrow, source-backed PR-branch defect in systemd env rendering that automation can repair with focused regression tests.; Needs attention: The PR still has a concrete secret-handling regression in the doctor/install repair path.; Review finding: [P2] Keep file-only secrets out of Environment= — src/daemon/systemd.ts:596 (sha=91ad44f370c75d2b9bb9e13829353731a16c0afb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR merges existing `gateway.systemd.env` entries with state-dir `.env` entries, clears tracked OpenClaw-managed inline keys, adds systemd regression tests, and records a changelog fix for #76860.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: `readSystemdServiceExecStart` merges EnvironmentFile keys into the command env, `buildGatewayInstallPlan` preserves safe existing keys, and the PR then keeps non-dotenv keys in the inline environment when rendering the unit.
commands.review_followup: There is one narrow, source-backed PR-branch defect in systemd env rendering that automation can repair with focused regression tests.
